basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Engineer, Junior Engineer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Assistant Engineer (Electrical) & Junior Engineer (Civil & Electrical) Notification 2026 has been released on 21 April 2026 on the official website https://esic.gov.in . A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Assistant Engineer (Electrical) & Junior Engineer (Civil & Electrical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years for all posts. Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree/Diploma in Electrical Engineering from recognized University/Institution., Degree/Diploma in Civil Engineering from recognized University/Institution.
qualification.details: Assistant Engineer (Electrical): Degree/Diploma in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Junior Engineer (Civil): Degree/Diploma in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institution. Junior Engineer (Electrical): Degree/Diploma in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/Institution.

salary_details.details: Assistant Engineer (Electrical): Rs. 33,630/- - Rs. 45,000/- Per Month Junior Engineer (Civil): Rs. 33,630/- - Rs. 45,000/- Per Month Junior Engineer (Electrical): Rs. 33,630/- - Rs. 45,000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://esic.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for ESIC Recruitment 2026 is 12th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Assistant Engineer (Electrical) and Junior Engineer (Civil & Electrical) in the ESIC Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree/Diploma in Electrical Engineering for Assistant Engineer (Electrical) and Junior Engineer (Electrical) posts, and a Degree/Diploma in Civil Engineering for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the ESIC vacancies?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 64 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for these positions ranges from Rs. 33,630/- to Rs. 45,000/- per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. Candidates must download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, and send it along with required documents to the specified address by post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Engineer and Junior Engineer posts in ESIC will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ESIC office located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for ESIC, Andhra Pradesh, specifically in Vijayawada, with the pincode 520004.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contract-based as per the information provided in the recruitment notification.
